title: Per-User Dashboard Authentication
summary: Each user logs into the web dashboard with their own credentials. Sessions are isolated — one user can never see another user's positions, P&L, or settings. First-time login triggers the one-time setup screen.
approach: Add FastAPI session middleware with per-user JWT tokens. User table: username, hashed password (bcrypt), container_id, setup_complete flag. On login: verify password, issue short-lived JWT, store in httpOnly cookie. All dashboard routes require valid JWT. If setup_complete is false: redirect to setup screen instead of main dashboard. Add admin route (owner only) to create new user accounts. No OAuth needed at this scale — simple username/password is sufficient.
